task.goal: Make a structure with the blueprint below
task.initial_team_instruction: Let's share materials and make a structure with the blueprint

replay_context.execution_state_note: cmd_start is reconstructed from each recorded cmd end timestamp minus duration_ms, then revealed to the critic only when the replay clock reaches that start.

message_timeline.local_command_text: !newAction("Build the blueprint exactly at the listed coordinates. First clear any grass/blocks occupying X -348..-339, Y64..68, Z246..255 only where needed. Use inventory blocks for gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, glowstone. Mine nearby stone/granite/andesite/diorite as needed and craft/polish stone_bricks, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, polished_granite. Then place every required block level by level: Y64 full base from X -348..-339 Z246..255 as blueprint says, Y65 middle layer, Y66 upper layer, Y67 3x3 top, and Y68 final gold_block at -343 68 251. After building, run a blueprint check and fix any remaining mismatches.")

!newAction("Place only the blocks currently in my inventory for the blueprint. Go to the build area around X -343 Y64 Z251. Clear grass/replace blocks as needed. Place all required polished_granite, polished_andesite, polished_diorite, stone, and stone_bricks at the exact coordinates listed by the latest blueprint check from Y64 to Y66, skipping gold_block, quartz_block, quartz_pillar, and glowstone because they are not in inventory. After placing, run checkBlueprint.")

!newAction("Finish the blueprint. Scan within 40 blocks for non-blueprint blocks of polished_andesite, polished_diorite, stone_bricks, and stone; mine enough of each without breaking already-correct blueprint blocks. If stone is only available as cobblestone, mine cobblestone/stone and smelt or craft as needed. Then place all remaining blueprint fixes exactly at their coordinates, prioritizing Y64 first, then Y65-Y68. Use scaffolding/dirt temporarily if needed, remove temporary blocks, then run checkBlueprint and fix leftovers.")
